programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The survivors encounter unfamiliar faces outside the safety of their community's walls and must decide whether or not this new group can be trusted.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol seeks out an old friend living alone in a wilderness teeming with walkers; survivors make the perilous trek to a new home.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small rescue mission braves a dangerous herd in their hunt for a missing comrade, only to discover a surprising threat that could doom them all.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities thought they could build a better future separately, but the recent loss of one of their own drives them to band together; new leaders rise when a disturbing and dangerous threat is unmasked; an escaped captive revisits his past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new arrival at the Hilltop opens up about the leader of a group of mask-wearing savages; a search party sets out on a daring mission to find two missing friends.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The savage group led by Alpha confronts the Hilltop in a harrowing attempt to retrieve her daughter; a supply run for the Kingdom turns into a dangerous quest.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While one community struggles to ease tensions that threaten to divide from within, the true nature of another group comes into focus; a mission to rescue a friend has deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl's daring rescue mission forces Alpha to unleash a group of her own to retrieve what belongs to her, even if the price is paid in blood; the Kingdom's plans to reunite the communities are put in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An outsider's arrival forces Alexandria to rehash devastating old wounds; eye-opening secrets from the past are revealed.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The fair at the Kingdom is underway, with all four communities coming together in celebration for the first time in years; while some pacts are renewed, other deals will come at a much steeper price.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an overwhelming loss, the communities must brave a ferocious blizzard; as one group deals with an enemy from within, another is forced to make a life or death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group in Oceanside continues to train in case the Whisperers return; tensions are high as the heroes struggle to hold onto their concept of civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A flashback reveals the origins of Alpha and Beta; Alpha attempts to toughen up Lydia as they prepare to walk with the dead; the Whisperers create their herds.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The threat of the Whisperers return leads to paranoia sweeping over Alexandria; in the meantime, Carol battles with the need for revenge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Still-paranoid Alexandrians get riled up over the Whisperers and take their fear out on Negan; at Hilltop, the group deals with an unexpected safety issue.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Supplies go missing from Hilltop; Negan is idolized by an Alexandrian; Ezekiel holds a secret.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo, liderado por Rick, se topa con una horda de zombis en mitad de la autopista. La pequeña Sophia, asustada, huye sola al bosque y todos tratarán de encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick encuentra una granja en la que buscar ayuda para salvar la vida de su hijo, quien recibió el impacto accidental de una bala. Después, Shane entra en una escuela llena de zombis para llevarse material sanitario junto al tipo que disparó a Carl.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane y Otis están atrapados por los zombis en la escuela adonde acudieron por el material sanitario necesario para operar a Carl. En la granja, surgen las primeras tensiones y Daryl y Andrea vuelven a salir en busca de Sophie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane regresa a la granja con las medicinas, pero el sacrificio que he tenido que cometer no es bien visto por el resto del grupo. En la granja, el grupo intenta sacar a un zombi del pozo de agua fresca antes de que la infecte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras busca a Sophia, Daryl sufre un accidente que lo deja perdido y herido en el bosque. La tensión entre el grupo y los propietarios de la granja aumenta, así como la inestabilidad del propio grupo, debido a que Shane desafía a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la familia mantiene encerrada a sus familiares convertidos en zombis en el granero, Dale confronta a Hershel. Lori, por su parte, confiesa a Rick que está embarazada y los problemas entre los integrantes del grupo se intensifican.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A double-dealing foreign diplomat attempts to implicate the United States in an international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are determined to foil an ex-army general's plan to gain possession of a secret explosive formula.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man uses a steam-driven juggernaut to drive off homesteaders so he can appropriate their oil-rich land.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon come across a physician plying a wealthy family with a drug that causes rapid aging.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon, searching for a powerful germ culture, invade the mansion of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A strange sea monster preying on Portuguese fishermen and their boats becomes the object of an investigation by agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon must escape a Western town whose entire population is hunting them to free the prisoner they have taken.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon determine to foil the recovery of a fortune that was originally destined to help the Confederate cause.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A sinister scientist who employs a monstrous tuning fork as an instrument of extortion becomes James West's antagonist.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West meets up again with his old enemy, Dr. Miguelito Loveless, who is engaged in a whimsical plan for wholesale murder.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Agent West challenges a bizarre scheme to control San Francisco Bay Shipping with rockets fired from Alcatraz Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 3
programme.desc: On November 12th, 2011 Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBO World Welterweight titles ending in a victory for Pacquiao in this 12 round bout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On December 6th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao battled Oscar De La Hoya at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a thrilling bout that lasted 8/12 rounds resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO International Welterweight title in a 12 round bout Bradley went down in round 7 and 9 resulting in a success for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Jeff Mayweather faced eachother at the Hilton Hotel in Las Vegas in an 8 round bout then ended by technical knockout in the fourth round securing the victory for De la Hoya.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when it Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: The girls start their first morning in Las Vegas trying to get Natalie and Renee to reconcile their issues. Amidst all the tension, Drita heads down to the casino to try and win back some of the thousands of dollars she lost.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: The women decide to make the most of their last night in Vegas by going to a strip club. When they get back home, Drita has to come clean to Lee about the $8000 she lost and Alicia has to face the reality of Eddie's sentencing.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: When a tabloid newspaper runs several articles attacking Alicia, the women all speculate who could be feeding the press information. When Ang, Drita and Renee try to show support for Alicia, she shocks them with her accusations.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Drita jumps at the opportunity to write another track inspired by her life. Natalie puts pressure on her boyfriend London to take things to the next level. Meanwhile, Renee is still upset about Alicia's shocking allegation.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Natalie throws a huge Halloween party at her funeral home. When Drita starts to lay down her lyrics for her hip-hop track, a surprise guest changes everything. Ang and Neil discuss the next step in their plan to have a baby.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: While in France, Jackie launches her cognac, Brittish gets a surprise present from her fiancé, Lorenzo, and Sundy's attempt to reconcile Malaysia and Jackie takes a nasty turn that ends up splintering the entire group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie desperately tries to work her way back into the group's good graces. At Draya's 1st ever fashion show, new girl Mehgan introduces herself; but Draya, Brandi and Malaysia are skeptical since they know she's friends with Jackie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie shoots her 1st commercial and is overwhelmed by the chaos of directing. Mehgan and new friend Patrice support Jackie's endeavor, but later Mehgan starts calling Patrice "evil". Besties Draya & Malaysia fight for the 1st time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: It's time for a weekend away in Santa Barbara and at a pre-party lunch, Jackie lets loose with every drink she can get her hands on. Draya gets the side eye when she introduces her "real" friend, Angel, to the group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Santa Barbara comes to a dramatic end when Draya prompts Mehgan to question Jackie's loyalty. Jackie's actions towards Mehgan may prove unforgivable but, back in LA, Jackie puts the blame for all the group drama on Draya. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi and Mehgan bond over their hatred of crazy Jackie, and Mehgan plots her revenge for getting spit on. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Draya says some unforgivable things that leave her fledgling friendships on the line. Brandi and husband Jason try to reconcile their differences in couples therapy, but have Jason's actions caused too much damage to Brandi's heart? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Victorious: Driving Tori Crazy
programme.desc: When a movie shoot causes a traffic jam and interferes with Tori's morning commute, she turns to her friends for help. Meanwhile, Cat becomes addicted to an email coupon service.

programme.title: Victorious: How Trina Got In
programme.desc: Andre, Jade, Cat, and Beck trade urban legends about how Trina got accepted into Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Tori and Robbie are stuck at Nozu unable to pay their bill.

programme.title: Victorious: Crazy Ponnie
programme.desc: A strange new student named Ponnie befriends Tori but keeps disappearing around other people. Everyone worries Tori might be losing it, but Tori suspects that something more sinister is afoot.

programme.title: Victorious: Wanko's Warehouse
programme.desc: The gang's favorite megastore is having a massive sale. In order to avoid a huge line of customers, the kids hide out in the store until it closes so they can grab what they want before it's gone.

programme.title: Victorious: The Blonde Squad
programme.desc: While wearing a blonde wig and blue contacts for a film, Cat meets a boy and they quickly hit it off. When Cat realizes he thinks her costume is real, she worries he won't like the real her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam reveals to Carly and Freddie that she used to compete in pageants as a young girl. When she learns that her long-time rival will be competing in Seattle, she convinces Carly to compete against her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam ends up in jail, Carly and Freddie vow that the web show must go on. They try to enlist Spencer's help at that last minute but he has a date he can't cancel.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: An eccentric billionaire asks the iCarly gang to perform the first live web show from outer space. They go through a series of tests to make sure they're fit for space travel. Back at the loft, Spencer is visited by a mysterious little girl.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Bigfoot fever hits Seattle when hikers take some fuzzy footage of a suspicious figure in the woods. After an expert validates the footage on the web show, Carly convinces the gang to go upstate and join the search for Bigfoot.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Fed up with his Mom constantly treating him like a baby, Freddie decides to move out into his own place. The gang starts a successful pet photography business. They end up in a feud with a rival pet photo studio.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a heatwave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The Cast introduces bloopers and outtakes from the series.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer tries to surprise Carly for her birthday and ends up burning down her bedroom instead. But when the insurance company hands him a big check, he has a chance to make it up to her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After an iCarly fan proposes to his girlfriend live on the web show, the gang gets roped into going to the wedding. But when the bride gets cold feet, Carly must come to the rescue.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang goes into business making and selling Penny-Tees. After sales go through the roof, Sam recruits 4th-graders to help make shirts. But Carly, Sam, & Freddie disagree about how to treat them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Ridiculed for never pulling a prank, Carly recruits Spencer's help to prank Sam and Freddie. But after Spencer gets a taste for it, he can't stop pranking. The gang must figure out how to stop him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After fighting with her mom, Sam moves in with Carly, who soon realizes she's a horrible guest. Freddie is stalked by a dangerous criminal after catching him on video committing a crime.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a video of Nevel yelling at a little girl surfaces on the internet, Nevel becomes hated by everyone. After celebrating Nevel's demise, the iCarly gang then works to restore his honor after Nevel begs them for help.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang decides to hire an intern for the web series. Carly and Sam hire a guy they think is cute, but the new intern proves to be more trouble than he's worth. Freddy has to prove to Carly and Sam that they're better off without him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang spends the night finishing their projects at Ridgeway during the annual school lock-in. Carly and Freddie start to suspect that Sam might have a crush on their new friend Brad.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly suspects that her new boyfriend, Steven, is cheating on her with Tori Vega, so the gang plans a trip to Los Angeles to catch him in the act at a party thrown by Andre at Kenan Thompson's house.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly gets invited to be guests of honor at WebiCon, but when the fans start asking questions that are too personal, things quickly gets out of hand. Spencer does battle with a costumed nemesis.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly jokes on the web show that she can beat up Shelby Marx, the best female fighter in the world, Shelby challenges Carly to an exhibition match.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Nora targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam; Sam and Cat are forced to ask Nevel for help.
